description: List, read, write, and delete objects in an OCI Object Storage bucket.

tools.description:
Lists, reads, writes, or deletes objects in a configured OCI Object Storage bucket using resource-principal auth.

When to use: Use when the user asks to read, fetch, write, upload, save, persist, list, browse, or delete an object, file, blob, artifact, log, or export stored in an OCI Object Storage bucket. Supports `list`, `get`, `put`, and `delete` operations on the bucket configured in `conf.bucket`.

How to discover inputs: The bucket, namespace, and region are pre-bound in `conf` â€” do not ask the user for them. If the user has not named a specific object, FIRST call with `operation='list'` (optionally with a `name` prefix) and ask them to pick from the returned keys.

How to communicate: Summarize listed keys in plain prose (count + a few names). For `get`, report size and a short text preview or MIME hint â€” never dump large binary payloads.

Example: user says 'show me yesterday's log'. Call {operation:'list', name:'logs/2026-06-15/'} -> pick a key -> call {operation:'get', name:'logs/2026-06-15/run.log'}.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: The action to perform on the bucket. Use `list` to browse object keys (optionally filtered by `name` as a prefix), `get` to download an object's bytes/text, `put` to upload `content` under `name`, `delete` to remove the object at `name`. Default to `list` first when the target object key is unknown.

schema.name: name
schema.description: Object key for `get`, `put`, and `delete`, or a key prefix for `list`. Use slash-delimited paths like `logs/2026-06-15/run.log` or a folder-style prefix like `exports/`. Optional for `list` (omit to list from the bucket's configured `prefix` root); required for `get`, `put`, and `delete`.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Text payload to upload when `operation='put'`. Pass UTF-8 text (JSON, CSV, plain text, etc.); for binary uploads, base64-encode first and note that in the key. Required for `put`; ignored for `list`, `get`, and `delete`.

_confDescriptions.bucket: Object Storage bucket NAME. OCI Console -> Storage -> Object Storage -> Buckets.
_confDescriptions.namespace: OCI Object Storage namespace (auto-detected if blank). OCI Console -> top-right -> Tenancy info -> Namespace.
_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.prefix: Optional object name prefix filter for list operations (e.g. 'logs/2026/').
_confDescriptions.max_keys: Max objects returned by list operation (default 200).
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit.
_confDescriptions.max_retries: Max retry attempts for transient OCI Object Storage errors (default 3).
